subcodes.first_line: Thou didst ask concerning the realm of spirit and how it is, after ascension from this world to the hidden realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سؤال از عالم روح نموده بوديد که بعد از صعود از اين جهان بجهان پنهان چگونه و چسانست
subcodes.subjects: @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @soul; spirit after death, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
